{"result":"Day advanced to 2026-03-19.

## RESULTS SINCE YOUR LAST SESSION (2026-03-18 -> 2026-03-19)

- "What specific part of Jerusalem will be reported as struck by an explosion seconds after missile sirens on March 20, 2026?"

- "What bank will French authorities say was targeted in a foiled explosive attack at its Paris headquarters in March 2026?"

- "Which country will Sri Lanka publicly identify, by March 2026, as having asked to land two combat aircraft at Mattala airport?"

- "Who will be reported as the IRGC spokesman whose funeral is held in Iran by March 2026?"

- "Which organization will be reported as rescuing a toddler from rubble after an airstrike by 29 March 2026?"

## YOUR CUMULATIVE PERFORMANCE TILL TODAY
- Total Predictions: 330 (300 resolved, 30 active)
- accuracy: 9.1% | brier skill score: 0.011 | time weighted score: 139.54
  accuracy = fraction of ALL questions (resolved + active) where your top outcome matched the truth (0 credit for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); brier skill score = mean brier skill score across ALL questions (0 for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); time weighted score = sum of brier skill scores across all resolved questions, across all days you held your respective predictions"}
